tasks.subject: Task a: SweeperLoop + _SweeperStats substrate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land the background-thread substrate that calls sweep() per cadence, folds report into cumulative stats, writes the sweeper:<host> ledger entry, and supports atomic SIGHUP reload.

**Files:** Create src/kinoforge/core/sweeper.py + tests/core/test_sweeper.py.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_sweeper.py -v → 12 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/sweeper.py", "tests/core/test_sweeper.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_sweeper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SweeperLoop interval_s<=0 raises ValueError", "Eager first tick before Event.wait", "stop() bounded by join_timeout_s", "sweep() exception caught; errors_total increments", "Each tick touches sweeper:<host> with heartbeat_thread_tick + stats", "fold counts actions + snapshot verdicts", "reload atomic under _reload_lock; wakes sleep"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task b: sweep() filter for sweeper:* synthetic ids
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One-line eid.startswith('sweeper:') continue at top of sweep() per-entry loop so daemon's own liveness entry is not classified or reaped.

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py (around line 334) + tests/core/test_reaper_sweep.py (+1 test).

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper_sweep.py -v → all green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py", "tests/core/test_reaper_sweep.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_reaper_sweep.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sweep() snapshot omits sweeper:* ids", "provider_for not called for _sweeper", "Existing test_reaper_sweep cases pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task c: SweeperConfig pydantic model + Config.sweeper + policy bridge
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SweeperConfig BaseModel (interval_s default 60, include_orphans + force_forget opt-ins, host str|None) + Config.sweeper field via Field(default_factory=SweeperConfig) + sweeper_policy_from_cfg(cfg) bridge composing DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY ∪ opt-ins.

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/core/config.py + tests/core/test_config.py (+3 tests).

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v -k sweeper → 3 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v -k sweeper", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Config w/o sweeper block loads with defaults", "interval_s<=0 raises ValidationError", "sweeper_policy_from_cfg composes correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task d: sweeper_metrics pure renderers (human / JSON / Prom)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure render functions (no I/O) — render_status_human, render_status_json, render_metrics_prom — taking a ledger-entry dict + interval_s + host + now and returning text/JSON. Six Prom series with kinoforge_sweeper_* prefix + labelled deferred_total{reason=...}.

**Files:** Create src/kinoforge/core/sweeper_metrics.py + tests/core/test_sweeper_metrics.py.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_sweeper_metrics.py -v → 6 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/sweeper_metrics.py", "tests/core/test_sweeper_metrics.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_sweeper_metrics.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 Prom series + 3 deferred reasons + LF endings", "No-entry path emits zeros + omits last_sweep_ts", "JSON shape per §4.6.3", "stale strict >", "human key=value", "running false on missing/zero pid"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task e: CLI sweeper start/stop/status/metrics subcommand family
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Argparse sweeper subparser + four _cmd_sweeper_* handlers in cli/_commands.py + dispatcher branch in cli/_main.py + signal handlers (SIGTERM/SIGHUP/SIGUSR1) + synthetic Instance materialised via Ledger.record at startup.

**Files:** Modify src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py + src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py + create tests/cli/test_cmd_sweeper.py.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_sweeper.py -v → 7 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "tests/cli/test_cmd_sweeper.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_sweeper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["status no entry exit 0 running=false", "--json shape per spec", "--prom series + LF", "stop no entry stderr exit 1", "stale entry stale=true", "start banner INFO before signal install", "start records synthetic Instance + pid"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task f: Cross-process subprocess tests (start→SIGTERM→stop; SIGHUP reload)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end xprocess coverage. Spawn python -m kinoforge sweeper start in subprocess against LocalProvider on tmp_path; verify ledger entry materialises within 10s; SIGTERM exits 0 within 10s; status post-stop reports last_sweep_age_s > 0; SIGHUP after YAML edit shortens cadence.

**Files:** Create tests/cli/test_cmd_sweeper_xprocess.py.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_sweeper_xprocess.py -v → 3 passed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/cli/test_cmd_sweeper_xprocess.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_sweeper_xprocess.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["subprocess start writes sweeper:<host> within 10s; SIGTERM exits 0", "status after stop last_sweep_age_s > 0", "SIGHUP shortens cadence ~1s within 15s"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task g: examples + README + invariant scan + closeout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Operator-facing surface (examples/configs/sweeper.yaml + README Sweeper-daemon section) + core/sweeper_metrics.py purity invariant + PROGRESS.md B1 closeout strike + warm-reuse-tasks.txt lines 523-555 replacement. Last commit references the merge sha.

**Files:** Create examples/configs/sweeper.yaml; modify README.md + tests/test_core_invariant.py + PROGRESS.md + warm-reuse-tasks.txt.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py tests/test_core_invariant.py -v → green; git log --oneline -10 shows closeout commits.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/sweeper.yaml", "README.md", "tests/test_core_invariant.py", "PROGRESS.md", "warm-reuse-tasks.txt"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py tests/test_core_invariant.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["examples/configs/sweeper.yaml loads via load_config", "README Sweeper section present", "test_core_sweeper_metrics_module_is_pure passes", "PROGRESS B1 struck with merge sha", "warm-reuse-tasks.txt B1 block replaced"]}
```
